metadata.name: surety_core
metadata.description: SURETY fully collateralized prize indemnity and prop settlement vault

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ZeroCoverage
errors.msg: coverage must be greater than zero

errors.name: ZeroPremium
errors.msg: premium must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidBucketCap
errors.msg: bucket cap must be between 1 and 10,000 basis points

errors.name: InvalidEpoch
errors.msg: withdrawal epoch must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidMargin
errors.msg: margin must be at least 10,000 basis points

errors.name: InvalidFormulaVersion
errors.msg: formula version must be non-zero

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: arithmetic overflow

errors.name: MathUnderflow
errors.msg: arithmetic underflow

errors.name: SolvencyInvariantViolation
errors.msg: vault accounting invariant failed

errors.name: ReserveBalanceMismatch
errors.msg: reserve token balance does not match free-reserve accounting

errors.name: DepositTooSmall
errors.msg: deposit is too small to mint one share

errors.name: WithdrawalTooSmall
errors.msg: withdrawal is too small to return one asset unit

errors.name: WithdrawalNotPending
errors.msg: withdrawal request is not pending

errors.name: EpochNotReached
errors.msg: withdrawal epoch has not been reached

errors.name: InsufficientFreeReserves
errors.msg: vault does not have enough free reserves

errors.name: EmptyVault
errors.msg: vault has no LP capital

errors.name: BucketCapExceeded
errors.msg: outcome bucket cap would be exceeded

errors.name: InvalidPredicate
errors.msg: predicate encoding is empty or too long

errors.name: PredicateHashMismatch
errors.msg: predicate hash does not match canonical predicate bytes

errors.name: InvalidExpiry
errors.msg: policy expiry must be in the future

errors.name: PolicyNotOpen
errors.msg: policy is not open

errors.name: PolicyNotExpired
errors.msg: policy has not reached its expiry

errors.name: EscrowBalanceMismatch
errors.msg: policy escrow does not contain the full coverage amount

errors.name: InvalidShareSupply
errors.msg: share supply and capital state are inconsistent

errors.name: TxlineProofTooLarge
errors.msg: TxLINE proof contains too many nodes or stats

errors.name: InvalidProofTimestamp
errors.msg: TxLINE proof timestamp cannot derive a valid daily root

errors.name: InvalidTxlineRoot
errors.msg: TxLINE daily scores root is not the expected program-owned PDA

errors.name: TxlineSerializationFailed
errors.msg: failed to serialize the pinned TxLINE validation instruction

errors.name: MissingTxlineReturnData
errors.msg: TxLINE validation CPI returned no result

errors.name: InvalidTxlineReturnProgram
errors.msg: validation return data did not originate from TxLINE

errors.name: TxlinePredicateRejected
errors.msg: TxLINE rejected the policy predicate

errors.name: SettlementPredicateMismatch
errors.msg: settlement proof does not exactly match the policy predicate

errors.name: SettlementNotFinal
errors.msg: settlement requires TxLINE final-period statistics

errors.name: InvalidAttestationSequence
errors.msg: attestation sequence must extend the current vault head

errors.name: InvalidAttestationPreviousHash
errors.msg: attestation previous hash does not match the current vault head

errors.name: AttestationBookMismatch
errors.msg: attested reserves or locked collateral do not match the vault

errors.name: InvalidSolvencyRatio
errors.msg: attested solvency ratio does not match reserves and marked liabilities

errors.name: InvalidAttestationHash
errors.msg: attestation record hash does not match its canonical fields

errors.name: TxlineOddsRejected
errors.msg: TxLINE rejected the odds record or its Merkle proof

errors.name: InvalidOddsMarket
errors.msg: TxLINE odds record is not a supported full-match 1X2 market

errors.name: OddsPolicyMismatch
errors.msg: TxLINE odds record does not match the policy fixture or outcome

errors.name: OddsMessageHashMismatch
errors.msg: odds message ID does not match the receipt PDA hash

errors.name: StaleOddsProof
errors.msg: TxLINE odds proof is too old or dated too far in the future

errors.name: OddsPremiumMismatch
errors.msg: policy premium does not match the on-chain calculation from validated odds

errors.name: VerifiedQuoteHashMismatch
errors.msg: quote hash does not commit to the validated TxLINE proof and policy terms

errors.name: ValidatedOddsRequired
errors.msg: this vault requires TxLINE-validated odds issuance

errors.name: TxlineFixtureRejected
errors.msg: TxLINE rejected the fixture record or its Merkle proof

errors.name: InvalidFixture
errors.msg: TxLINE fixture record is malformed or unsupported

errors.name: FixtureIdMismatch
errors.msg: TxLINE fixture identity does not match the expected fixture

errors.name: BucketHashMismatch
errors.msg: bucket hash does not match the policy fixture and outcome

errors.name: InvalidBrokerCommission
errors.msg: broker commission cannot exceed 1,000 basis points

errors.name: SelfReferral
errors.msg: the policy holder cannot receive their own broker commission
